comment: End-to-end fixture: synthetic MFT transcript 2 (14 messages, 16 asks). The calibration-pair fixture — collapse traps (M1-M4 must each yield ONE ask) set against split controls (M5/M6 must each yield TWO), plus the build-it vs does-it-exist feedback gate (feedback must be exactly {bulk-edit, heat-map}; bulk-DEACTIVATE and 0-byte stay in support). See mft_test_answer_key_2.md. NOTE: the answer key says recurring = exactly 1 (concurrency) — the Slack-alert+Kafka and archiving+encoding pairs observed merging in the v2.21 field run are adjudicated FALSE merges and asserted apart here.

message_asks.contains: archive files after a successful transfer
bulk edit of multiple scheduled actions
concurrent transfers running on a node
